mapper.select:
SELECT f.faq_no, f.category_cd, c.code_nm AS category_nm, f.question, f.answer, f.sort_ord, f.use_yn, f.created_at, f.created_by FROM tb_faq f LEFT JOIN tb_com_code c ON c.grp_cd = 'FAQ_CATEGORY_CD' AND c.code = f.category_cd WHERE f.use_yn = 'Y'
AND f.category_cd = #{searchCategory}
AND f.question LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
ORDER BY f.sort_ord ASC, f.faq_no ASC

SELECT f.faq_no, f.category_cd, c.code_nm AS category_nm, f.question, f.answer, f.sort_ord, f.created_at, f.created_by FROM tb_faq f LEFT JOIN tb_com_code c ON c.grp_cd = 'FAQ_CATEGORY_CD' AND c.code = f.category_cd WHERE f.faq_no = #{faqNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_faq (category_cd, question, answer, sort_ord, use_yn, created_by) VALUES (#{categoryCd}, #{question}, #{answer}, (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(sort_ord), 0) + 1 FROM tb_faq f2), 'Y', #{createdBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_faq SET category_cd = #{categoryCd}, question = #{question}, answer = #{answer}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE faq_no = #{faqNo}
UPDATE tb_faq SET use_yn = 'N', updated_at = NOW() WHERE faq_no = #{faqNo}
mapper.select:
SELECT f.faq_no, f.category_cd, c.code_nm AS category_nm, f.question, f.answer, f.sort_ord, f.use_yn, f.created_at, f.created_by, f.updated_at, f.updated_by FROM tb_faq f LEFT JOIN tb_com_code c ON c.grp_cd = 'FAQ_CATEGORY_CD' AND c.code = f.category_cd
ORDER BY f.sort_ord ASC, f.faq_no ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
